case_title: WENJIAN WANG et al VS. CHRISTINE SPAGNUOLO et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-09-486336 WITH CASE CGC-08-480216, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
